description: A customer is asking how to update the maps in their car's built-in navigation system.

nodes.task_description: Identify the vehicle's model year and infotainment system version.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a 2020 model with the SYNC 3 system.

nodes.task_description: Determine if the update is delivered via OTA or requires a manual download to a USB drive.

expected_outcome.value: Agent's search reveals this system requires a manual USB update.

nodes.task_description: Guide the customer to the official website where they can download the map update, and explain the process of loading it onto a USB and installing it in the car.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a link to the download portal and clear instructions.
